prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction of MDT (Medtronic), I assume typical stock volatility of 1-2% daily for large-cap healthcare stocks. The point estimate remains at current price assuming random walk. Confidence intervals widen with higher confidence levels, incorporating potential daily moves of ±1.3% (50% CI), ±2.6% (80% CI), and ±3.2% (90% CI) based on historical volatility patterns for established medical device companies.
